subcodes.first_line: O attracted leaf! Thy letter was received. Thy revered mother attained unto the kissing of the Sacred Threshold, and thou likewise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه نامه ات رسید والده محترمه بتقبیل عتبه مقدسه فائز گردید و تو نیز در
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
